code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 验证实体存在性
query_company = text("SELECT id, name, district_id FROM polluting_company WHERE id = 2444")
company_df = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print(f"公司2444信息：")
print(company_df)

query_district = text("SELECT id, name, city_id FROM district WHERE id = 31")
district_df = pd.read_sql(query_district, engine)
print(f"\n区31信息：")
print(district_df)

# 获取公司2444的烟气排放数据（2025-06-20 12:00到2025-06-22 12:00）
query_company_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
company_emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_company_emission, engine)
print(f"\n公司2444烟气排放数据行数：{len(company_emission_df)}")
print(company_emission_df.head())

# 获取区31的AQI时间序列（2025-06-20 12:00到2025-06-22 12:00）
query_district_aqi = text("""
SELECT timestamp, aqi, air_quality_level, pm2_5, pm10, so2, no2, o3, o3_8h, co, primary_pollutants, composite_index
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
district_aqi_df = pd.read_sql(query_district_aqi, engine)
print(f"\n区31 AQI数据行数：{len(district_aqi_df)}")
print(district_aqi_df.head())

# 获取曹妃甸区（id=31）的邻近区县
query_neighboring = text("""
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.code, ST_Distance(d.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = 31)) as distance_m
FROM district d
WHERE d.id != 31
  AND ST_DWithin(d.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = 31), 50000)
ORDER BY distance_m
""")
neighboring_df = pd.read_sql(query_neighboring, engine)
print(f"\n曹妃甸区邻近区县（50公里内）：")
print(neighboring_df)

# 获取高分辨率风场数据（2025-06-20 12:00到2025-06-22 12:00）
query_wind = text("""
SELECT coordinate, wind_speed, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, timestamp
FROM hourly_grid_wind
WHERE timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
LIMIT 100
""")
wind_df = pd.read_sql(query_wind, engine)
print(f"\n风场数据行数（前100条）：{len(wind_df)}")
print(wind_df.head())

# 存储结果到变量
company_total_flue_gas = None
origin_district_mean_aqi = None
origin_district_max_aqi = None

# 暂存数据供综合代理使用
company_emission_staged = company_emission_df
district_aqi_staged = district_aqi_df
neighboring_districts_staged = neighboring_df
wind_field_staged = wind_df

print(f"\n=== 数据暂存完成 ===")
print(f"公司排放数据行数：{len(company_emission_staged)}")
print(f"区AQI数据行数：{len(district_aqi_staged)}")
print(f"邻近区县数量：{len(neighboring_districts_staged)}")
print(f"风场数据行数：{len(wind_field_staged)}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 计算公司2444的总烟气排放量
query_company_total = text("""
SELECT SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
company_total_result = pd.read_sql(query_company_total, engine)
company_total_flue_gas = float(company_total_result['total_exhaust_gas'].values[0])
print(f"公司2444总烟气排放量：{company_total_flue_gas}")

# 计算区31的平均AQI和最大AQI
query_district_aqi_stats = text("""
SELECT AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi, MAX(aqi) as max_aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
district_aqi_stats = pd.read_sql(query_district_aqi_stats, engine)
origin_district_mean_aqi = float(district_aqi_stats['mean_aqi'].values[0])
origin_district_max_aqi = float(district_aqi_stats['max_aqi'].values[0])
print(f"区31平均AQI：{origin_district_mean_aqi}")
print(f"区31最大AQI：{origin_district_max_aqi}")

# 验证数据完整性
print(f"\n=== 数据验证 ===")
print(f"公司2444排放记录数：{len(company_emission_staged)}")
print(f"区31 AQI记录数：{len(district_aqi_staged)}")
print(f"邻近区县数量：{len(neighboring_districts_staged)}")
print(f"风场数据记录数：{len(wind_field_staged)}")

# 存储最终结果
print(f"\n=== 最终结果存储 ===")
print(f"company_total_flue_gas = {company_total_flue_gas}")
print(f"origin_district_mean_aqi = {origin_district_mean_aqi}")
print(f"origin_district_max_aqi = {origin_district_max_aqi}")

import pandas as pd

# 首先检查已有的变量，看看哪些数据已经可用
print("=== 检查已有变量 ===")
print(f"company_total_result 类型: {type(company_total_result)}")
print(f"district_aqi_stats 类型: {type(district_aqi_stats)}")
print(f"wind_field_staged 类型: {type(wind_field_staged)}")
print(f"neighboring_districts_staged 类型: {type(neighboring_districts_staged)}")

# 检查company_total_result的内容
if isinstance(company_total_result, pd.DataFrame):
    print("\n=== company_total_result ===")
    print(company_total_result.to_string())

# 检查district_aqi_stats的内容
if isinstance(district_aqi_stats, pd.DataFrame):

# 检查wind_field_staged的内容
if isinstance(wind_field_staged, pd.DataFrame):
    print("\n=== wind_field_staged (前10行) ===")
    print(wind_field_staged.head(10).to_string())

# 检查neighboring_districts_staged的内容

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 提取公司总烟气排放量
company_total_flue_gas_value = company_total_result['total_exhaust_gas'].iloc[0]
print(f"公司2444总烟气排放量: {company_total_flue_gas_value}")

# 2. 提取曹妃甸区AQI统计
origin_district_mean_aqi_value = district_aqi_stats['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
origin_district_max_aqi_value = district_aqi_stats['max_aqi'].iloc[0]
print(f"曹妃甸区平均AQI: {origin_district_mean_aqi_value}")
print(f"曹妃甸区最大AQI: {origin_district_max_aqi_value}")

# 3. 分析风场数据，确定污染传输方向
print("\n=== 风场数据分析 ===")
print(f"风场数据时间范围: {wind_field_staged['timestamp'].min()} 到 {wind_field_staged['timestamp'].max()}")
print(f"风场数据记录数: {len(wind_field_staged)}")

# 统计风向分布
wind_direction_dist = wind_field_staged['wind_direction'].value_counts()
print(f"\n风向分布:\n{wind_direction_dist}")

# 统计风向角度分布
wind_degree_stats = wind_field_staged['wind_degree'].describe()
print(f"\n风向角度统计:\n{wind_degree_stats}")

# 4. 确定曹妃甸区的位置，计算下风向区县
# 获取曹妃甸区的坐标
query_caofeidian_coord = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate 
FROM district 
WHERE id = 31
""")
caofeidian_df = pd.read_sql(query_caofeidian_coord, engine)
print(f"\n曹妃甸区坐标: {caofeidian_df['coordinate'].iloc[0]}")

# 获取周边区县的坐标
query_neighboring_coords = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate 
FROM district 
WHERE id IN (32, 33, 26, 29, 39, 25, 28)
""")
neighboring_coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_neighboring_coords, engine)
print(f"\n周边区县坐标:\n{neighboring_coords_df}")

# 5. 计算曹妃甸到各周边区县的方向
print("\n=== 曹妃甸到周边区县的方向 ===")
for _, row in neighboring_coords_df.iterrows():
    query_azimuth = text(f"""
    SELECT degrees(ST_Azimuth(
        (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = 31),
        (SELECT coordinate FROM district WHERE id = {row['id']})
    )) as bearing_degrees
    """)
    azimuth_df = pd.read_sql(query_azimuth, engine)
    bearing = azimuth_df['bearing_degrees'].iloc[0]
    print(f"{row['name']} (id={row['id']}): 方位角 = {bearing:.1f}°")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 计算公司2444在2025-06-20 12:00到2025-06-22 12:00期间的总烟气排放量
query_company_total = text("""
SELECT SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_flue_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
company_total_df = pd.read_sql(query_company_total, engine)
company_total_flue_gas_value = float(company_total_df['total_flue_gas'].values[0]) if company_total_df['total_flue_gas'].values[0] is not None else 0.0
print(f"公司2444总烟气排放量: {company_total_flue_gas_value}")

# 2. 计算曹妃甸区(district_id: 31)在该时间段的平均AQI
query_district_mean = text("""
SELECT AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
district_mean_df = pd.read_sql(query_district_mean, engine)
origin_district_mean_aqi_value = float(district_mean_df['mean_aqi'].values[0]) if district_mean_df['mean_aqi'].values[0] is not None else 0.0
print(f"曹妃甸区平均AQI: {origin_district_mean_aqi_value}")

# 3. 计算曹妃甸区(district_id: 31)在该时间段的最大AQI
query_district_max = text("""
SELECT MAX(aqi) as max_aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
district_max_df = pd.read_sql(query_district_max, engine)
origin_district_max_aqi_value = float(district_max_df['max_aqi'].values[0]) if district_max_df['max_aqi'].values[0] is not None else 0.0
print(f"曹妃甸区最大AQI: {origin_district_max_aqi_value}")

# 存储结果
company_total_flue_gas = company_total_flue_gas_value
origin_district_mean_aqi = origin_district_mean_aqi_value
origin_district_max_aqi = origin_district_max_aqi_value

print(f"\n最终结果:")
print(f"company_total_flue_gas: {company_total_flue_gas}")
print(f"origin_district_mean_aqi: {origin_district_mean_aqi}")
print(f"origin_district_max_aqi: {origin_district_max_aqi}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Fresh recomputation for verification
# 1. Company total flue gas
q1 = text("""
SELECT SUM(exhaust_gas) as val
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
r1 = pd.read_sql(q1, engine)['val'].iloc[0]
company_total_flue_gas = float(r1) if pd.notna(r1) else 0.0

# 2. Origin district mean AQI
q2 = text("""
SELECT AVG(aqi) as val
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
r2 = pd.read_sql(q2, engine)['val'].iloc[0]
origin_district_mean_aqi = float(r2) if pd.notna(r2) else 0.0

# 3. Origin district max AQI
q3 = text("""
SELECT MAX(aqi) as val
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id = 31
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-20 12:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-22 12:00:00'
""")
r3 = pd.read_sql(q3, engine)['val'].iloc[0]
origin_district_max_aqi = float(r3) if pd.notna(r3) else 0.0

print(f"VERIFY company_total_flue_gas: stored=float | independent={company_total_flue_gas} | final={company_total_flue_gas}")
print(f"VERIFY origin_district_mean_aqi: stored=float | independent={origin_district_mean_aqi} | final={origin_district_mean_aqi}")
print(f"VERIFY origin_district_max_aqi: stored=float | independent={origin_district_max_aqi} | final={origin_district_max_aqi}")
